title: UPDATE does not work with DECLEAREd TABLE in FUNCTION
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE temp_table (id Int32, value String) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE temp_table SET value = 'new_value' WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: UPDATE on DECLAREd TABLE in FUNCTION fails
